query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_abb,
  SUM(CASE WHEN carbonServiceId IS NOT NULL AND carbonServiceId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as verified_by_carbon,
  SUM(CASE WHEN carbonServiceId IS NULL OR carbonServiceId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unverified_abb
FROM services WHERE provider = 'ABB' AND status != 'terminated';

SELECT externalId, customerExternalId, planName, serviceType, avcId, carbonServiceId, dataSource
FROM services 
WHERE provider = 'ABB' AND (carbonServiceId IS NULL OR carbonServiceId = '') AND status != 'terminated'
LIMIT 15;

SELECT provider, 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN carbonServiceId IS NOT NULL AND carbonServiceId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_carbon_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN avcId IS NOT NULL AND avcId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_avc
FROM services 
WHERE status != 'terminated'
GROUP BY provider
ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT

  SUM(CASE WHEN carbonServiceId IS NOT NULL AND carbonServiceId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as verified_by_carbon,
  SUM(CASE WHEN carbonServiceId IS NULL OR carbonServiceId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unverified_abb
FROM services WHERE provider = 'ABB' AND status != 'terminated';

SELECT externalId, customerExternalId, planName, serviceType, avcId, carbonServiceId, dataSource
FROM services 
WHERE provider = 'ABB' AND (carbonServiceId IS NULL OR carbonServiceId = '') AND status != 'terminated'
LIMIT 15;

SELECT provider, 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN carbonServiceId IS NOT NULL AND carbonServiceId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_carbon_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN avcId IS NOT NULL AND avcId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_avc
FROM services 
WHERE status != 'terminated'
GROUP BY provider
ORDER BY total DESC;
